// 03 — Our Story

Born from India's sock capital. Built for people who REFUSE to settle.

Tirupur isn't just where we're from — it's where the world's finest socks are made. We grew up surrounded by looms, yarns, and generations of hosiery craft. Kemon channels all of that into something you can actually feel with every step. Worn through full marathons, 12-hour workdays, and everything in between.

Smart Knitting System for adaptive fit
Y Heel Counter for all-day stability
Antibacterial bamboo fibres
Graduated compression technology
Seamless toe — zero irritation
Hypoallergenic & skin-safe

IG YT TW
Privacy Policy
Last updated: March 2024

At Kemon, your privacy matters. This explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

What We Collect

Name, email, delivery address, phone, and payment info when you order. Browsing data to improve your experience.

How We Use It

To process orders, send confirmations, respond to queries, and — only if you opt in — share offers.

Data Sharing

We never sell your data. Shared only with trusted delivery and payment partners under confidentiality agreements.

Your Rights

Request access, correction, or deletion anytime: privacy@kemon.in. Response within 7 business days.

Security

All transactions SSL-encrypted. No card data stored — handled by PCI-DSS certified processors.

Contact

privacy@kemon.in · Kemon Socks, Karuvampalayam, Tirupur, Tamil Nadu.

Terms & Conditions
Last updated: March 2024

By using www.kemon.in, you agree to these Terms.

Products & Pricing

All prices in INR inclusive of applicable taxes. Prices at order confirmation are final.

Orders & Payment

Orders confirmed on successful payment. Failed-payment deductions refunded within 5–7 business days.

Shipping

Free shipping above ₹499. Standard delivery 4–7 business days across India.

Cancellations

Cancel within 24 hours of placement. After dispatch, raise a return request once delivered.

Governing Law

Governed by Indian law. Disputes subject to courts in Tirupur, Tamil Nadu.

Contact

legal@kemon.in

Returns Policy
Last updated: March 2024

We want you to love every pair.

Eligibility

Returns within 7 days of delivery. Products must be unused, unwashed, in original packaging with tags intact.

Defective Items

Email a photo to support@kemon.in within 48 hours. Full replacement or refund — no questions asked.

Process

1. Email support@kemon.in with order number and reason.
2. Return label within 1 business day.
3. Refund or replacement within 5–7 business days of receiving the return.

Contact

support@kemon.in · WhatsApp: +91 XXXXX XXXXX (Mon–Sat, 9am–6pm IST)
